items.title: Composite function chain
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  x["input x"] --> g["inner g(x)"]
  g --> u["intermediate u"]
  u --> f["outer f(u)"]
  f --> y["output y"]
  g --> gprime["g prime(x)"]
  f --> fprime["f prime(u)"]
  gprime --> product["multiply"]
  fprime --> product
  product --> dy["dy/dx"]
items.caption: The chain rule multiplies the outer derivative f′(u) by the inner derivative g′(x).

items.title: Backpropagation as reverse chain rule
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  forward["forward: x to L"] --> loss["loss L"]
  loss --> gradL["dL/daL"]
  gradL --> layerL["chain through layer L"]
  layerL --> layer1["chain through layer 1"]
  layer1 --> params["dL/dW and dL/db"]
items.caption: Backprop walks the computation graph backward, applying the chain rule at each layer to reach parameter gradients.
